eventSummary:
Bybit has identified fraudulent behavior from an appeal applicant and is taking action against the account to maintain trading integrity and asset security.
Sources:
- https://t.me/bybitukrainian

GRIFFIN AI is facing community criticism for failing to carry out a promised buyback as part of a compensation plan following a hack, while simultaneously withdrawing liquidity without clear explanation.
Sources:
- https://t.me/GRIFFINai
